channel.title: Za Ndani
channel.description: Kenya and World News, Politics, Sports, and Entertainment

item.title: Afrobeats Evolution into a Multi-Billion Dollar Global Industry
item.dc:creator: Amara Ndlovu
item.description: The Afrobeats industry is now worth billions as streaming numbers soar and international investment floods the African creative market through major deals.
item.content:encoded: The Afrobeats industry is now worth billions as streaming numbers soar and international investment floods the African creative market through major deals.

item.title: Sheinelle Jones Shares Details of Met Gala Encounter with Rihanna
item.dc:creator: Mutheu Ann
item.description: Talk show host Sheinelle Jones reflects on a red carpet moment at the Met Gala where Rihanna shared words of encouragement and fashion praise.
item.content:encoded: Talk show host Sheinelle Jones reflects on a red carpet moment at the Met Gala where Rihanna shared words of encouragement and fashion praise.

item.title: Nakuru County to Provide Free Uniforms for Public ECDE Learners
item.dc:creator: Celestine Nzioka
item.description: Governor Susan Kihika has announced that Nakuru County will provide free uniforms to all public ECDE pupils starting in October to support local families.
item.content:encoded: Governor Susan Kihika has announced that Nakuru County will provide free uniforms to all public ECDE pupils starting in October to support local families.

item.title: UFC News: Louie Sutherland Victory and Latest Combat Sports Updates
item.dc:creator: Jona Munyi
item.description: Catch up on the latest MMA developments including Louie Sutherland's victory at UFC Perth, athlete career updates, and insights into combat sports.
item.content:encoded: Catch up on the latest MMA developments including Louie Sutherland's victory at UFC Perth, athlete career updates, and insights into combat sports.

item.title: Why Kenyan Hospitals Must Adopt Collective Surgical Decision Making
item.dc:creator: Jonathan Mwaniki
item.description: Surgical safety in Kenya requires a shift from individual autonomy to multidisciplinary review processes to reduce patient harm and improve outcomes.
item.content:encoded: Surgical safety in Kenya requires a shift from individual autonomy to multidisciplinary review processes to reduce patient harm and improve outcomes.

item.title: Portable compares mentorship styles of Olamide and Davido
item.dc:creator: Amara Ndlovu
item.description: Nigerian singer Portable has sparked online debate after comparing his interactions with Olamide and Davido regarding career support and guidance.
item.content:encoded: Nigerian singer Portable has sparked online debate after comparing his interactions with Olamide and Davido regarding career support and guidance.

item.title: Jon Stewart Challenges Donald Trump Over Cognitive Test Claims
item.dc:creator: Mutheu Ann
item.description: Jon Stewart addresses Donald Trump's assertions about his cognitive test performance, highlighting past failures in mathematical proficiency tests.
item.content:encoded: Jon Stewart addresses Donald Trump's assertions about his cognitive test performance, highlighting past failures in mathematical proficiency tests.

item.title: Understanding Data Privacy and Cookie Usage on Pulse Africa
item.dc:creator: Jona Munyi
item.description: Learn how Pulse Africa manages user data, cookies, and digital advertising practices to personalize your browsing experience.
item.content:encoded: Learn how Pulse Africa manages user data, cookies, and digital advertising practices to personalize your browsing experience.

item.title: AI Adoption Dismantles Entry Level Jobs and Career Growth
item.dc:creator: Elizabeth Muthoni
item.description: The rapid rise of AI is disrupting global industries and removing entry level roles, creating significant challenges for young professionals today.
item.content:encoded: The rapid rise of AI is disrupting global industries and removing entry level roles, creating significant challenges for young professionals today.

item.title: Government Increases Per-Learner School Capitation to Ksh 2,340
item.dc:creator: Celestine Nzioka
item.description: The Ministry of Education has announced an increase in school capitation funding to Ksh 2,340 per learner starting in July following a presidential directive.
item.content:encoded: The Ministry of Education has announced an increase in school capitation funding to Ksh 2,340 per learner starting in July following a presidential directive.

item.title: Kenya moves to prioritize individual accountability in public service
item.dc:creator: Jonathan Mwaniki
item.description: The government is transforming public service culture by shifting from rigid hierarchies to a focus on ethical duty and employee well-being.
item.content:encoded: The government is transforming public service culture by shifting from rigid hierarchies to a focus on ethical duty and employee well-being.

item.title: Armagh Advances to Ulster Senior Football Final Against Monaghan
item.dc:creator: Jona Munyi
item.description: Armagh secures a spot in their fourth consecutive Ulster Senior Football final after a dominant win over Down as they chase the Anglo Celt Cup.
item.content:encoded: Armagh secures a spot in their fourth consecutive Ulster Senior Football final after a dominant win over Down as they chase the Anglo Celt Cup.

item.title: Pulse Africa Disclosure of Data Collection and Tracking Practices
item.dc:creator: Jona Munyi
item.description: Pulse Africa reveals its data collection policies, detailing the use of cookies and tracking technology for advertising in Kenya.
item.content:encoded: Pulse Africa reveals its data collection policies, detailing the use of cookies and tracking technology for advertising in Kenya.

item.title: Kenyan SACCOs report asset growth despite rising payroll arrears
item.dc:creator: Grace Mkamburi
item.description: Kenya SACCO sector assets reached KSh 1.076 trillion in 2024, but liquidity remains pressured by KSh 3.49 billion in unremitted public sector deductions.
item.content:encoded: Kenya SACCO sector assets reached KSh 1.076 trillion in 2024, but liquidity remains pressured by KSh 3.49 billion in unremitted public sector deductions.

item.title: Kenya Scales Up Climate Action and Ecological Conservation Efforts
item.dc:creator: Jonathan Mwaniki
item.description: Kenya partners with international stakeholders to expand renewable energy and ecological restoration projects to protect agriculture and public health.
item.content:encoded: Kenya partners with international stakeholders to expand renewable energy and ecological restoration projects to protect agriculture and public health.

item.title: Kenya Allocates Ksh 3.36 Billion for New SGR Coaches and Wheelsets
item.dc:creator: Celestine Nzioka
item.description: The government has set aside Ksh 3.36 billion to acquire new SGR coaches and locomotive parts as part of a wider push to modernize Kenya railway services.
item.content:encoded: The government has set aside Ksh 3.36 billion to acquire new SGR coaches and locomotive parts as part of a wider push to modernize Kenya railway services.

item.title: Top 30 Family Films to Watch on Disney Plus
item.dc:creator: Mutheu Ann
item.description: Entertainment Weekly highlights thirty essential family-friendly movies on Disney Plus, featuring a mix of classic animation and hit live-action films.
item.content:encoded: Entertainment Weekly highlights thirty essential family-friendly movies on Disney Plus, featuring a mix of classic animation and hit live-action films.

item.title: Kenyan Wall Street and WorkL Launch Top Employer Awards

item.description: The Kenyan Wall Street and WorkL have partnered to recognize leading Kenyan employers based on workplace culture and employee wellness standards.
item.content:encoded: The Kenyan Wall Street and WorkL have partnered to recognize leading Kenyan employers based on workplace culture and employee wellness standards.

item.title: US Radio Network Rebrands to Honor Iconic Sitcom WKRP in Cincinnati
item.dc:creator: Mutheu Ann
item.description: Radio owner Jeff Ziesmann has rebranded his Ohio and Kentucky station network to honor the legacy of the hit 1970s television sitcom WKRP in Cincinnati.
item.content:encoded: Radio owner Jeff Ziesmann has rebranded his Ohio and Kentucky station network to honor the legacy of the hit 1970s television sitcom WKRP in Cincinnati.

item.content:encoded: Top law firm Bowmans expresses concern over Finance Bill proposals citing negative impacts on business compliance, investment, and consumer affordability.

item.title: Shocking Kang'ata UDA Exit After President's Visit
item.dc:creator: Celestine Nzioka
item.description: Kang'ata's UDA Exit Reshapes Murang'a Politics Murang'a Governor Irungu Kang'ata declared today he will not seek re-election on a United Democratic Alliance (UDA) ticket in 2027. This decision follows internal party pressure, differing strategic views, and a...
item.content:encoded: Kang'ata's UDA Exit Reshapes Murang'a Politics Murang'a Governor Irungu Kang'ata declared today he will not seek re-election on a United Democratic Alliance (UDA) ticket in 2027. This decision follows internal party pressure, differing strategic views, and a...

item.title: Woman consumes Eucharist wine and bread in viral video
item.dc:creator: Za Ndani
item.description: A woman sparked a religious debate after a video of her consuming Eucharist wine and bread at home went viral. Read the full story

item.title: Ipswich Town on Brink of Historic Premier League Return in Championship Final Day Drama

item.title: Francis Atwoli Links COTU Re-election to Fatherhood
item.dc:creator: Za Ndani
item.description: Francis Atwoli humorously links his COTU re-election to providing for his young son. Fans are amused by his fatherhood goals. Get the details.
item.content:encoded: Francis Atwoli humorously links his COTU re-election to providing for his young son. Fans are amused by his fatherhood goals. Get the details.

item.title: The Scramble for Starlight: Kenyan Representation I'm A Celebrity UK
item.dc:creator: The Chronicler
item.description: A grand stage in the southern sun, yet the local stars remain unseen. The echoes of old partitions resonate, leaving popular Kenyan figures in shadow.
item.content:encoded: A grand stage in the southern sun, yet the local stars remain unseen. The echoes of old partitions resonate, leaving popular Kenyan figures in shadow.

item.title: 10 Kenya Flood Deaths Confirmed as Heavy Rains Persist
item.dc:creator: Celestine Nzioka
item.description: Police confirm 10 Kenya flood deaths as heavy rains cause landslides and bridge damage in Eastern and Coast regions. Get the full details here.
item.content:encoded: Police confirm 10 Kenya flood deaths as heavy rains cause landslides and bridge damage in Eastern and Coast regions. Get the full details here.

item.title: Isaac Mwaura Orders Garissa and Tana River Flood Evacuation
item.dc:creator: Za Ndani
item.description: Isaac Mwaura orders urgent flood evacuation in Garissa and Tana River as dam levels rise to emergency heights. Get the details.
item.content:encoded: Isaac Mwaura orders urgent flood evacuation in Garissa and Tana River as dam levels rise to emergency heights. Get the details.

item.title: Uhuru Kenyatta: Why I Will Not Quit Active Kenyan Politics
item.dc:creator: Celestine Nzioka
item.description: Former President Uhuru Kenyatta defends his role in active politics and Jubilee Party leadership despite calls for his retirement. Read the full story.
item.content:encoded: Former President Uhuru Kenyatta defends his role in active politics and Jubilee Party leadership despite calls for his retirement. Read the full story.

item.title: Sparky Kenya Explains Why Njugush Cannot Replace Wakavinye
item.dc:creator: Za Ndani
item.description: Sparky Kenya says Akamba women like Wakavinye are the best partners for marriage. Learn why Njugush will never replace her. Read the full story.
item.content:encoded: Sparky Kenya says Akamba women like Wakavinye are the best partners for marriage. Learn why Njugush will never replace her. Read the full story.

item.title: Irungu Nyakera Returns to Farmers Party After Failing to Secure DCP Nairobi Ticket
item.dc:creator: Zed Mogaka
item.description: Irungu Nyakera returns to the Farmers Party for his 2027 Nairobi governor campaign after failing to secure a ticket from the Democracy for Citizens Party.
item.content:encoded: Irungu Nyakera returns to the Farmers Party for his 2027 Nairobi governor campaign after failing to secure a ticket from the Democracy for Citizens Party.

item.title: Inside Treasury Plan to Cut Kenya Fuel Levy by 50 Percent
item.dc:creator: Celestine Nzioka
item.description: The National Treasury proposes a 50 percent cut to the Kenya fuel levy to lower costs for motorists and reduce the cost of living. Get the full details.
item.content:encoded: The National Treasury proposes a 50 percent cut to the Kenya fuel levy to lower costs for motorists and reduce the cost of living. Get the full details.

item.title: How Finance Bill 2026 Changes Kenya Tax Filing Deadline to April
item.dc:creator: Celestine Nzioka
item.description: Treasury CS John Mbadi proposes moving the Kenya tax filing deadline to April 30 starting 2027 to shorten the window for taxpayers. Get the details.
item.content:encoded: Treasury CS John Mbadi proposes moving the Kenya tax filing deadline to April 30 starting 2027 to shorten the window for taxpayers. Get the details.

item.title: Finance Bill 2026: How KRA Will Override Current Tax Deals
item.dc:creator: Celestine Nzioka
item.description: KRA will override tax arrangements in the Finance Bill 2026 to curb evasion. This affects businesses using complex deals to cut taxes. Read the full story.
item.content:encoded: KRA will override tax arrangements in the Finance Bill 2026 to curb evasion. This affects businesses using complex deals to cut taxes. Read the full story.

item.title: Security vulnerability in cPanel and WHM allows unauthorized administrative access without passwords
item.dc:creator: Elizabeth Muthoni
item.description: Urgent Cybersecurity Alert: Critical cPanel Vulnerability Threatens African Digital Infrastructure A severe security flaw, officially designated CVE-2026-41940, in cPanel and Web Host Manager (WHM) allows unauthorized root administrative access without...
item.content:encoded: Urgent Cybersecurity Alert: Critical cPanel Vulnerability Threatens African Digital Infrastructure A severe security flaw, officially designated CVE-2026-41940, in cPanel and Web Host Manager (WHM) allows unauthorized root administrative access without...

item.content:encoded: President William Ruto urges his Rift Valley stronghold to register for the 2027 election, citing sluggish voter registration in the Kalenjin community.

item.title: Inside Finance Bill 2026 Plan to Tax Classic Cars 50%

item.description: Finance Bill 2026 car tax targets luxury vintage vehicles worth over 10 million with a new 50 percent excise duty for revenue. Read the full story.
item.content:encoded: Finance Bill 2026 car tax targets luxury vintage vehicles worth over 10 million with a new 50 percent excise duty for revenue. Read the full story.

item.title: President William Ruto Raises Alarm Over 1.8 Million Unregistered Voters in Rift Valley Stronghold
item.dc:creator: Zed Mogaka
item.description: President William Ruto warns that 1.8 million eligible voters in his Rift Valley stronghold remain unregistered ahead of the 2027 General Election.
item.content:encoded: President William Ruto warns that 1.8 million eligible voters in his Rift Valley stronghold remain unregistered ahead of the 2027 General Election.

item.title: Inside Finance Bill 2026: New Taxes on Phones and Betting
item.dc:creator: Celestine Nzioka
item.description: CS John Mbadi submits Finance Bill 2026 to Parliament, raising taxes on phones and betting. Kenyans face higher costs on imports. Read the full story.
item.content:encoded: CS John Mbadi submits Finance Bill 2026 to Parliament, raising taxes on phones and betting. Kenyans face higher costs on imports. Read the full story.
